productDisplayName: French Connection Women Black Beaded Clutch
description: Style Note This season's french connection line features bold animal prints in bags with a fantastical burst of colour in the high street brand's attitudinal style. Add to this potent mix a simplistic design and minimalistic hardware and we have this lust-worthy piece, perfect to add that refined facelift   to your season wardrobe.  Product Details Coloured beaded upper in the clutch bag with a magnetic button closure and a flap Has a separator and a pouch inside the main compartment Material and Care 100% polyurethane Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size Height: 15 cm Width: 25 cm Style NoteThis season's French Connection line features bold animal prints in bags with a fantastical burst of colour in the high street brand's attitudinal style.
